meta.title: Seek Construction LLC | Excavating, Site Work & Drainage | Edmond, OK
meta.description: Seek Construction LLC is an engineer-led, woman-owned earthwork and utility contractor serving Oklahoma and surrounding states. Excavating, site work, storm drainage, and underground utilities. Bonded, insured, TERO certified.

hero.h1: We move the dirt that *everything* is built on.
hero.lead: Engineer-led excavating, site work, storm drainage, and underground utilities, delivered with GPS precision.

services.heading: From Raw Ground to a Build-Ready Site
services.intro: A complete earthwork and underground utility partner for commercial, public, tribal, and private construction across Oklahoma and surrounding states.

cards.title: Excavating & Earthwork
cards.desc: Mass excavation, cut & fill, hauling, and dirt work scaled from single pads to full subdivision and campus sites.

cards.title: Site Work & Grading
cards.desc: GPS-guided rough & finish grading, building pads, subgrade prep, and erosion control built to engineered tolerances.

cards.title: Storm & Drainage
cards.desc: Storm sewer, detention, culverts, and drainage systems engineered to handle Oklahoma's heaviest rains.

cards.title: Underground Utilities
cards.desc: Water, sanitary sewer, and underground utility installation as a City of OKC certified utility operator.

why.heading: Credentials That De-Risk Your Project
why.intro: We bring engineering discipline, certified operators, and modern technology to every yard of dirt we move.

cards.title: Engineer-Led Operations
cards.desc: Our work is directed by a licensed Professional Engineer, bringing design-grade planning and accountability to the field.

cards.title: OKC Certified Utility Operator
cards.desc: Certified utility operator for the City of Oklahoma City, qualified to install and tie into municipal utility systems.

cards.title: GPS on Every Job
cards.desc: GPS machine control and grade guidance on all jobs: fewer stakes, tighter tolerances, and faster, more accurate production.

cards.title: Safety Focused
cards.desc: A safety-first culture protects our crews, your schedule, and everyone on site, every single day.

cards.title: Bonded & Insured
cards.desc: Fully bonded and insured for the protection and peace of mind of every owner and general contractor we partner with.

cards.title: ABC Member
cards.desc: Proud member of Associated Builders and Contractors, committed to merit-based, quality construction.

cards.title: TERO Certified
cards.desc: TERO certified and Native American-owned, qualified for tribal employment-rights projects across Indian Country.

cards.title: Woman Owned
cards.desc: A certified woman-owned business, bringing diverse-supplier eligibility and a different standard of care to the field.

projects.heading: Trusted by the Region's Top Builders
projects.intro: A track record of earthwork and utility packages delivered for leading general contractors on public, commercial, tribal, and private projects.

gallery.heading: Project Gallery
gallery.intro: Job site photos of grading, excavation, and utility work in progress.

about.heading: An engineer-led earthwork & utility company built on Oklahoma ground.
paragraphs: Seek Construction LLC is a woman-owned, Native American-owned earthwork and underground utility contractor based in Edmond, Oklahoma. We partner with general contractors, developers, and public agencies to take sites from raw ground to build-ready.

With operations led by a licensed Professional Engineer, GPS machine control on every job, and certification as a City of OKC utility operator, we deliver work that is precise, safe, and built to last. We're bonded, insured, an ABC member, and TERO certified.

glance.label: Specialties
glance.value: Excavating · Site Work · Storm Drainage · Underground Utilities

glance.label: Certifications
glance.value: TERO · OKC Utility Operator · Bonded · Insured · ABC Member

glance.label: Technology
glance.value: GPS Machine Control · Grade Guidance on All Jobs

contact.heading: Request a Bid
contact.intro: Have a site that needs moving, grading, or utilities? Send us your plans and we'll get you a number.
